fields.i_receive: frontier model capability, zero export controls
fields.you_receive: a model named 'Fugu' after the fish that can kill you

narrative_summary: Sakana's pitch of frontier power without export-ban risk is the trade, undercut by naming the model after lethally poisonous pufferfish.
rationale: Candidate 4 uses the real product name 'Fugu' and lands a self-contained twist — the same word naming the model also names a fish that can kill you — making the trade-offer template pay off with an actual reversal rather than restating the export-ban premise like the others.
story_title: Asian AI startups launch Mythos-like models
hat_pair: foam satellite dish worn as a hat with a tiny blinking antenna
foam light bulb hat with a tiny glowing filament at the peak
